description_long: This shotgun features a robust metallic receiver and barrel with a matte, slightly weathered finish, complemented by a dark synthetic stock and fore-end. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a vented rib running along the top for improved aiming and heat dissipation. The pump-action fore-end is textured for grip and appears to be made of a durable polymer. The stock is a full, straight design with a slight ergonomic curve and a visible buttpad for recoil absorption. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing a single trigger. Subtle red markings and wear patterns are visible on the stock and receiver, suggesting frequent handling or use.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a matte metal barrel, vented rib, and dark synthetic full stock, showing signs of wear and red markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the metallic receiver, vented barrel, and dark synthetic stock with red markings.
description_view_1: Front-on view down the barrel, highlighting the cylindrical shape, vented rib, and the symmetry of the fore-end and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the pump-action fore-end, receiver, and the ergonomic curve of the stock.
description_view_3: Rear view from the buttstock, showing the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and rib.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
